8_iPDC_drug

Goals:

Functional testing of novel immunotherapy combinations in iPDCs, and evaluate the utility of iPDCs for precision oncology approaches

Investigate baseline ATR and immune pathway activation as a predictor for sensitivity to combinatorial ATR inhibition on iPDC matched tissue samples using tCyCIF
